Mobile Welding and
Fabrication

Professional welding and fabrication services for commercial, industrial, and agricultural projects. On-site mobile welding within 100 miles of Fair Play, Missouri.

REQUEST A QUOTE
WHAT WE DO

OUR SERVICE PILLARS

STRUCTURAL WELDING

Steel buildings, barns, frames, and heavy structural fabrication. AWS D1.1 & D1.2 code compliant.

LEARN MORE

HEAVY EQUIPMENT

On-site repair for machinery, construction vehicles, and truck/trailer (steel & aluminum).

LEARN MORE

PIPE WELDING

Tie-ins, new construction, and line repairs for damage or aging infrastructure.

LEARN MORE

CUSTOM FABRICATION

Farm gates, aluminum frames, marine & boat repair, mining equipment, and aerospace components (case-by-case).

LEARN MORE

CERTIFICATIONS & CREDENTIALS

AWS D1.1Structural Steel
AWS D1.2Aluminum
API 1104Pipeline
NHRAChassis Certified
D17.1Aerospace
Lincoln Electric
18+YEARS EXP.
WHO WE ARE

BUILT ON HARD WORK
& DEDICATION

CRK Welding was founded by Cody, an AWS-certified welder with 18 years of hands-on experience spanning oil fields, mining operations, aviation, and motorsports. After 14 years on the road — from Wyoming ranches to Texas refineries and North Dakota pipelines — Cody settled in Fair Play, Missouri in 2022 to build a business rooted in family values and old-fashioned hard work.

Today, CRK Welding serves commercial, industrial, and agricultural clients within a 100-mile radius, bringing the same precision and dedication earned at Lincoln Electric Welding School — directly to your jobsite.

AWS CERTIFIEDLincoln Electric trained
24/7 ON-CALLAfter-Hours Support
100-MILE RADIUSMobile service

DAYS DON'T END AT 5 PM

We're on-call when you need us — night shifts, road closures, equipment failures. When a broken machine can't stay in the road, CRK Welding answers the call.
